title: jurinea shahrestanica
intro: Jurinea shahrestanica, also known as Shahrestaniki, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea shahrestanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
